name: Elmira Sour Cream Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450°F. Line the 9-inch pie plate with pastry. Trim and flute the edges; do not prick the pastry.
With a rotary beater, beat flour, sugar, and sour cream (use commercial sour cream from the store).
Arrange flat edge of peach quarters on the pastry in concentric circles.
Pour sour cream on top.
Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes, then lower the heat to 350°F and bake for 25-30 minutes or until filling is set.
Sprinkle brown sugar over hot pie. Broil for 1-2 minutes until sugar is melted.
Serve warm.
